message.reasoning_content:
We are asked to split the text into its distinct facets: separate aspects, conditions, or sub-claims. Output a JSON array of 2-4 short strings, each self-contained facet in the text's own terms. No invention, no overlap. If only one facet, return one element.

Text: "Shadow-Frog: Coding Agents that Dream and Discover. Shadow-Frog is an agentic discovery system that builds a codebase memory for coding agents through active exploration rather than passive recording. Shadow-Frog turns idle coding-agent time into autonomous discovery loops . In discovery sessions, agents run experiments on underexplored parts of the codebase and capture learnings in a shadow knowledge base. We find Shadow-Frog agents are better than baselines at retrieving knowledge, detecting bugs, and ideating new features. Unlike other"

The text ends abruptly: "Unlike other" - but we only consider the given text. So facets:

- "Shadow-Frog is an agentic discovery system that builds a codebase memory for coding agents through active exploration rather than passive recording." -> facet about what it does (builds memory via active exploration).
- "Shadow-Frog turns idle coding-agent time into autonomous discovery loops." -> facet about utilizing idle time for discovery loops.
- "In discovery sessions, agents run experiments on underexplored parts of the codebase and capture learnings in a shadow knowledge base." -> explanation of the discovery sessions: experiments on underexplored parts, capturing learnings.
- "We find Shadow-Frog agents are better than baselines at retrieving knowledge, detecting bugs, and ideating new features." -> performance claim: better at retrieval, bug detection, feature ideation.

The last bit "Unlike other" is incomplete, ignore.

These facets seem distinct: system description, idle time usage, mechanism of discovery sessions, evaluation results. So I'll output them as short strings, each self-contained.

Facet 3: "In discovery sessions, agents run experiments on underexplored parts of the codebase and capture learnings in a shadow knowledge base."
Facet 4: "Shadow-Frog agents are better than baselines at retrieving knowledge, detecting bugs, and ideating new features."

I'll shorten slightly if needed, but maintain self-contained. The JSON array should have these strings. The text says "output ONLY a JSON array", so I'll output exactly that.

Thus: ["Shadow-Frog is an agentic discovery system that builds a codebase memory for coding agents through active exploration rather than passive recording.", "Shadow-Frog turns idle coding-agent time into autonomous discovery loops.", "In discovery sessions, agents run experiments on underexplored parts of the codebase and capture learnings in a shadow knowledge base.", "Shadow-Frog agents are better than baselines at retrieving knowledge, detecting bugs, and ideating new features."]

But note: the original text had "We find Shadow-Frog agents are better..." so I'll keep "We find Shadow-Frog agents" to be faithful. The facet is the finding claim. So: "We find Shadow-Frog agents are better than baselines at retrieving knowledge, detecting bugs, and ideating new features."

I'll include the "We find". That's part of the text. No need to edit.
